app.title: TG Vault
app.subtitle: Manage and organize your digital assets.
app.dropTitle: Click or drag files to upload
app.dropSubtitle: Any file is supported; files over 40 MiB use chunked upload

file.renameExtHint: The file extension cannot be changed

delete.title: Confirm deletion?
delete.subtitle: This action cannot be undone
delete.description: This will permanently delete “{{name}}”. This action cannot be undone.

upload.chunkHint: Files over 40 MiB use chunked upload
upload.keepUsing: Uploads continue in the background; you can keep browsing or add files

empty.title: No files found
empty.description: Try dragging files here or check your filters.

root.title: No files here yet
root.description: Upload a file or create a folder to start organizing your assets.

folder.title: This folder is empty
folder.description: Upload to this folder or return to its parent.

search.title: No matching files
search.description: Try another keyword or clear the search.

filter.title: No files in this category
filter.description: Choose another category or upload a matching file.

offline.title: Cannot reach the server
offline.description: Check your network connection and try again.

error.title: Could not load files
error.description: The service is temporarily unavailable. Try again shortly.

stale.title: Showing previously loaded data
stale.description: Refresh failed; this content may be out of date.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage appearance, security, Telegram, storage, and data maintenance.
